title: astragalus fragrans
intro: Astragalus fragrans is a type of plant species belonging to the legume family, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, where it is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to adapt to stress and maintain balance. The health benefits of Astragalus fragrans include boosting the immune system, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus fragrans is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
